# NA·QAMUS — the ocean of words ships — (R-061 · 2026-07-21)

**2026-07-21** · HANDOFF §5, first deliverable after the phrasebook · R-055 (academic rigor) governs

---

## The dictionary

**`deliverables/qamus.html`** — generated by `tools/qamus.js` from `roots.json` + `frozen.json`; regenerable forever, hand-typed never. 251 roots · 32 letter-sections · 2,624 indexed forms · 23 frozen lexemes.

**R-061 · Dictionary order (steward, under R-058):** the body organizes by **hijāʾī root-order** with each Ajami extension after its base letter (ب←پ، ج←چ، ز←ژ، ف←ڤ، ك←گ) — the practice of Persian, Kurdish, and Urdu dictionaries, our script kin; the **alphabetical index** runs in extended-Latin order (diacritics beside their bases). Heritage organizes; accessibility finds.

**The entry anatomy** (R-055 in print): skeleton headword → class + **honest status chip** (verified teal · pending crimson · coined copper — the stats line counts them on the cover: 245 · 2 · 4) → citation in four scripts **with IPA** → gloss → **etymology verbatim** from the source field (the Egyptological ꜣḫt passes through untouched) → the **full 11-template family, engine-derived** (quads Pattern-I + citation per D-4; lexemes citation-only) → R-flags as printed chips: the ledger travels inside the book.

**The cover confesses the constitution**: *"A false ancestor is the one unforgivable error — pending flags stand until sources do."* The dictionary wears its honesty as front matter.

## Housekeeping

- The phrasebook went to print same-day: `deliverables/kitebi-kilemiat.pdf` — 31 pages, five typefaces embedded (Playwright Chromium; no local Chrome).
- 87/87 tests green. Next per HANDOFF §5: **kitebi niḥewi·i** (the grammar textbook — ~20 lessons, Optimize-pass sequencing, Leipzig glosses from the corpus; spec/01 orthography bank folds in), then the Optimize sweeps.

*Na·qamus pe baḥar kilemiāt·i. Ḏakira, saša, ma la nasiya.*
